blockers.title: Under-18 event path ships hosted youth events without the vault-required safeguard gate
blockers.evidence: The vault under-18 decision says under-18 members may join, hold a youth certificate, and receive youth-appropriate content, but anything else is case-by-case approved by Mervat; it also says WAI-ME's own youth events are a later phase requiring vetted volunteers, two-adult rule, guardian and photo consent, and that launch youth content is only a signpost with no hosted youth content to build at launch (`WAI/01 Organization/01 Under-18 Members & Mentorship Safeguards (Decision).md:42-45`, `:47-54`, `:66-72`, `:76-82`). The diff creates a live admin path for `audience_lane: "youth"` events with only `requireAdmin` and generic field validation (`convex/admin/events.ts:210-339`), publishes them with only an attendability check (`convex/admin/events.ts:423-465`), exposes them to active minors (`convex/events.ts:37-52`, `:162-188`), and lets those minors RSVP or join the waitlist (`convex/events.ts:262-351`). The admin UI also offers an "Under 18" audience radio with no safeguard fields or approval state (`src/admin/views/EventEditor.tsx:629-655`).
blockers.required_fix: For this launch slice, remove or server-disable hosted youth event publication and RSVP: reject `audience_lane: "youth"` at publish time, or keep it draft-only, leaving the youth portal as the Aviation for Girls signpost. If youth events are intentionally brought forward, add an explicit vault-approved safeguard model before publish: Mervat-only approval, vetted staff/two-adult coverage, guardian/photo consent requirements, audit fields, and tests proving minors cannot book until all required safeguards are satisfied.

non_blocking_notes: `npm run typecheck` passed and `git diff --check main...HEAD` passed. I could not complete Gate 5 verification in this read-only sandbox: `npm test` aborted before running suites because Vitest/Vite attempted to write under `node_modules/.vite-temp`, and `npm run check` aborted because Astro attempted to write `.astro/content.d.ts`.
No real secrets were found in the reviewed diff sweep; secret-like values observed were env var names or test placeholders.
A diff-only check found no added em dashes in member-facing `src` or `convex` strings; the only added dash hit I saw was non-member-facing README table punctuation.

spec_compliance.criterion: A. Events: youth lane visibility and RSVP
spec_compliance.evidence: The lane filter itself exists, but the implementation violates the vault source behind the criterion by making WAI-ME hosted youth events publishable and bookable without the under-18 safeguards required by the vault.

spec_compliance.criterion: A. Events: restricted_unknown sees no events
spec_compliance.evidence: `laneSeesEvent` returns false for `restricted_unknown`, and list/detail/RSVP all call it server-side (`convex/events.ts:37-52`, `:162-188`, `:217-230`, `:262-280`).

spec_compliance.criterion: A. Events: published events must be attendable and audience freezes after draft
spec_compliance.evidence: Live edits reject missing logistics and lane changes; publish rejects missing logistics (`convex/admin/events.ts:349-364`, `:443-449`).

spec_compliance.criterion: B. Opportunities: minors and restricted_unknown never see adult opportunities
spec_compliance.evidence: `laneMaySeeBoard` requires active `standard` or `ally`; list/detail/apply all enforce it server-side (`convex/opportunities.ts:88-95`, `:121-127`, `:165-179`, `:218-240`).

spec_compliance.criterion: D. Directory: minors/restricted never appear and directory-tier fields only
spec_compliance.evidence: The canonical predicate requires opt-in, active_member+, standard/ally, active lifecycle; minor/restricted viewers are locked out, and returned fields omit gender, DOB, email, and mobile (`convex/directory.ts:7-15`, `:29-61`, `:73-87`, `:139-151`).

spec_compliance.criterion: F. Members admin: contact behind audited reveal
spec_compliance.evidence: List rows omit email, dossiers mask contact, and raw contact is returned only by `revealMemberContact` after `requireAdmin` and an audit write (`convex/admin/members.ts:9-16`, `:135-199`, `:297-303`, `:504-537`).

spec_compliance.criterion: H. Reports: aggregates only and platform health super-admin only
spec_compliance.evidence: Report queries return counts/aggregate buckets only, while `getPlatformHealth` calls `requireSuperAdmin` (`convex/admin/overview.ts:158-249`, `:292-299`).
Not verified in this read-only Gate 4 run because `npm test` and `npm run check` attempted filesystem writes and aborted. `npm run typecheck` did pass.

summary: DO-NOT-SHIP. The material blocker is a safeguarding gap: the slice turns hosted under-18 events into a live publish-and-RSVP workflow, while the vault says launch youth content is only signposting and WAI-ME youth events require later-phase safeguarding controls.
